{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322040901F20DD422A00F2873E883"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616354340827743038","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看，作者大大继续更新，加油，加油，加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773322868,"group_id":"7613974089899707417","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1dDBtE4jP/xLR1/gp+dcXL/yBO2RaozquLXBZNxm+W3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2214892770970794","user_name":"巫城的陆小山"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2214892770970794","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7613974089899707417","book_info":{"abstract":"【洪荒+封神+西游】帝坤穿越洪荒，成为天地间第一巫，不仅由盘古心头血化形而出，更是自带系统。
看着眼前十二个未来的弟弟妹妹们，帝坤大手一挥，“我的欧豆豆们，你们尽情撒欢吧，洪荒天地是父神的天下。有事大哥撑着。”
鸿钧：“巫妖两族不识天数，合该覆灭。”
帝坤：“老泥鳅，出来练练啊！躲在紫霄宫中算什么事？”
十二祖巫：“大哥，你为什么对我们这么好？”
帝坤：“长兄如父，长嫂如母，你们要是念我的好，就多给自己找几个嫂子吧！”
后土：“大哥，你看我行吗？”
玄冥：“哥哥，爱老虎油！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/c5171ea45914e327a306defb10a947aa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"盲歼击机","author_id":"","book_id":"7613974089899707417","book_name":"洪荒：我乃力之祖巫，盘古亲儿子","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3864人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7613974134694887961","read_count":"3864","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"94143"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"40","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,东方玄幻,封神","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c5171ea45914e327a306defb10a947aa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307741&x-signature=OmAfT4pYXLNRH5WDDdetWV3HpHY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"699711643201694","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"32"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322040901F20DD422A00F2873E883"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"r
